role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments that are designed to provide, in the aggregate, 200% exposure to the price performance of GOOG on a daily basis. The fund is non-diversified.

info.longName: T-Rex 2X Long Alphabet Daily Target ETF
